message:
feat(scheduler): enhance global injector with extended capabilities

Expands the global injector module (+183 lines) to support more
sophisticated task injection patterns, while refining three_lane
scheduler integration.

## Global Injector Enhancements
- Add priority-aware injection queues
- Support for tagged task groups
- Add injection rate limiting to prevent runaway injection
- Improve injection metrics and observability hooks

## Three Lane Scheduler Integration
- Refactor injector integration points (-8 lines cleanup)
- Better handoff between injector and scheduler lanes
- Cleaner separation of concerns

These changes enable more fine-grained control over how external
tasks enter the scheduler, important for fair resource sharing
in multi-tenant scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
